events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes fireblocking/draftstopping work where foam was used where fire-rated sealant was required (identified by color/label). This is a non-compliant condition. The work is at rough-complete stage. IRC R302 requires fire-rated materials for fireblocking. Using non-fire-rated foam where fire-rated sealant is required is non-compliant and a fire safety hazard.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (fire safety)
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 85 (rough-complete)
Confidence: high, 0.9

    "Remove non-compliant foam from all affected fireblocking/draftstopping locations.",

  ],
  "rationale": "Fireblocking and draftstopping in rated assemblies must use fire-rated materials. Substituting standard foam where a fire-rated sealant is specified compromises the fire-resistance rating and violates IRC R302 requirements.",
